# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs
        run: |
          # validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs here

      - name: Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant
        run: |
          # apply least privilege and explicit allowlists here

      - name: Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs
        run: |
          # keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs here

      - name: Run custom build scripts
        run: |
          # run custom build scripts here

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          # deploy to production here
